title: liabum uniflorum
intro: Liabum uniflorum, also known as Ceylon alpine or Himalayan gentian, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Liabum uniflorum include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Liabum uniflorum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
